name: retro-local-mp3-player
description: Local retro MP3 player with Spotify account integration and spotdl download hooks.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check api/_lib.mjs && node --check api/config.mjs && node --check api/library.mjs && node --check api/library/import.mjs && node --check api/stream/[trackId].mjs && node --check api/download.mjs && node --check api/downloads.mjs && node --check api/spotify/login.mjs && node --check api/spotify/callback.mjs && node --check api/spotify/logout.mjs && node --check api/spotify/status.mjs && node --check api/spotify/me.mjs && node --check api/spotify/playlists.mjs && node --check api/spotify/recent.mjs && node --check api/spotify/search.mjs && node --check api/spotify/top.mjs
